rationale: State is scientifically critical but commit scope is inflated (116 untracked files). Remove only stale drafts first, then checkpoint full forensic lineage in logical splits.

proposed_logical_split_commits.name: checkpoint_core_execution_and_forensics
proposed_logical_split_commits.notes: Preserves run reproducibility and cross-probe comparisons end-to-end.

proposed_logical_split_commits.name: checkpoint_governance_and_design_context
proposed_logical_split_commits.notes: Preserves dataset-generation doctrine, diagnostics, and builders used to produce artifacts.
